chain.thought: Explanation: Reviewing the season premiere dates, only Season 6 premiered in September (September 6, 2010). All other seasons premiered in March or October.

judge_thought:

- Season 3: October

- Season 6: September (September 6, 2010)

Only Season 6 premiered in September, so the Prediction Answer "6" is correct.
